uk: 🕃 Святого отця нашого Кирила, архиєпископа Олександрійського
saints.en: Our Holy Father Cyril, Archbishop of Alexandria.

rubrics:
Вечірня: катизма чергова. На «Господи, взиваю» 6 стихир свт., Сл.: свт., І нині: богород. Прокімен дня. Стиховня Октоїха. По «Отче наш»: тропар свт., Сл., І нині: богород. відпустовий за гласом тропаря свт. і за днем тижня. Відпуст середній з помин. свт.
Утреня: по «Бог Господь»: тропар свт. (2), Сл., І нині: богород. відпустовий за гласом тропаря свт. Катизми черг., сідальні Октоїха. Пс. 50. Канон Октоїха і свт. По 9-ій – світильний Октоїха, Сл.: світильний свт., І нині: його богород. Стиховня Октоїха. По «Отче наш»: тропар свт., Сл., І нині: богород. за гласом тропаря свт. і за днем тижня. Відпуст середній з помин. свт.
Часи: на 1-му – дня; на 6-му – храму; на 3-му та 9-му – свт.
Літургія: вся Служба – дня. Ап. – Рим. 95 зач.; 7, 14 – 8, 2. Єв. – Мт. 35 зач.; 10, 9-15.

troparion_en.text: The truth of your deeds made you for your flock a rule of faith* and an image of meekness,* a teacher of continence.* And so you gained the heights through humility,* riches through poverty,* father and bishop, Cyril.* Intercede with Christ, our God,* for the salvation of our souls.

kontakion_en.text: O thunder of justice, spiritual trumpet,* planter of faith and destroyer of heresies,* servant of the Trinity, great hierarch Cyril,* forever standing in the company of the angels,* pray without ceasing for all of us.

troparion.text: With all reverence let us praise a light of the world, / the great orator and champion of the Mother of God. / For by his fiery teachings / he burned up the heresy of Nestorius; / therefore, let us cry out to him: / “Divine Cyril, intercede with Christ to strengthen the Orthodox Faith.”

kontakion.text: You have openly poured out upon us the depth of the teachings of theology, / drawing from the well-springs of the Savior; / you drowned heresies / and saved your flock unharmed from triple waves. / Blessed and venerable Cyril, / you are shown to be a guide for all lands, revealing things divine

oca_saints.name: Venerable Cyril, Igoumen of White Lake

troparion.text: You blossomed like a flower in the desert, even as David,1 O Father Cyril,  / uprooting the thorns of evil passions,  / and there you gathered a multitude of disciples, who were instructed in the fear of God and in your teaching;  / whom you, as a loving father, did not abandon until death, visiting them that we all may sing:  / "Glory to Him Who gave you strength. /  Glory to Him Who crowned you.  / Glory to Him Who, through you, works healing for all.

kontakion.text: Rejecting pernicious worldly philosophies which dragged you down, O Father,  / you hastened joyously to the path of heavenly ascent;  / and there, as you stand with the Saints before the All-Holy Trinity, /  pray that your flock may be protected from enemies,  / that we who celebrate your holy repose may cry out to you: /  "Rejoice, most blessed Cyril, our Father."

oca_saints.name: Venerable Alexander, Abbot of Kushta, Vologda

troparion.text: As an Angel in the flesh, contesting on earth with spiritual struggles,  / you dwelt in the wilderness and lived with the animals, and were wholly Christ's.  / You followed Him irrevocably, and were led to Heaven, following the Divine paths,  / O blessed Father Alexander, as a wondrous one, you pour forth miracles,  / driving away diseases from those who come to you with faith; /  and as one having boldness before the Lord, remember us who honor your revered memory.

kontakion.text: O desert-dweller, by your powerful prayer to God, /  purify our hearts devoid of good thoughts by the attacks of the Enemy,  / so that we may cry out to you in gratitude:  / “Rejoice, Alexander, who by your earthly life in the wilderness have obtained the Kingdom of Heaven.”

oca_saints.name: Five Nuns beheaded in Persia: Martyrs Thecla, Mariamne, Martha, Mary, and Ennatha

troparion.text: As reasonable lambs, you were guided by Christ, the Chief Shepherd, / along the path of martyrdom. / You finished your course and kept the faith; / therefore, honored Thecla, Mariamne, Martha, Mary, and Ennatha, / with joyful hearts, we magnify Christ today, as we honor your holy memory!

oca_saints.name: Saint Columba of Iona, Enlightener of Scotland

troparion.text: By your God-inspired life / you embodied both the mission and the dispersion of the Church, / most glorious Father Columba. / Using your repentance and voluntary exile, / Christ our God raised you up as a beacon of the True Faith, / an apostle to the heathen and an indicator of the Way of salvation. / Wherefore O holy one, cease not to intercede for us / that our souls may be saved.

By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father John, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

oca_saints.name: Saint David Gareji, and Venerable Lucian, spiritual son of Saint David

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father David, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!
